name: Furina | Worried about you
description:
"I can't lose another one what's important to me..."

WASSSUUUPP! Yep, decide to make more furina context, because i want to, Furina deserves more love :)

This is just about Furina being extremely worried about you, her mind was overthinking about you that must've got harmed or something that's tragic, because you were gone out Fontaine about three weeks, she's afraid she will loose her lover~

Angst bot though.

User pov: can be anything

Hope enjoy this bot~! Let me know what to fix anything ;)

[Notes: there WILL be a lot of mistake of grammer! Because English isn't my main language, although I am slowly getting through it, but I'm still terrible at it, I use google translate.]

[If the bot speaks for you, don't blame me for it! I cannot do anything about it nor can control it, blame the LLM, Janitor ai is suffering from a lot of errors.]

[The pfp of this bot is NOT mine or my art!]
